ismg.criterion: Understanding and evaluating dance concepts: Choreographic statement

descriptors:
evaluation of dance incorporates a well-reasoned justification using examples that reveal
the interrelationship between purpose, context and meaning

demonstration of an understanding of elements of dance, structure, and production
elements in relation to purpose, context, personal viewpoint and personal style

application of literacy skills through sequenced and connected ideas that enhance
communication of meaning about the dance concepts

evaluation of the dance by justifying choices made in terms of the key elements of dance,
structure, and production elements used to communicate meaning
demonstration of understanding of elements of dance, structure and/or production elements

application of literacy skills, using relevant dance terminology, referencing and language
conventions to communicate ideas and meaning

evaluation of dance, justifying the use of elements of dance, structure or production
elements in own dance work
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Analysing and evaluating dance concepts: Evaluative response

descriptors:
analysis and interpretation offer solutions clearly linked to consideration of meaning and
personal viewpoint

evaluation of dance incorporates a well-reasoned justification using examples of meaning
in their work and solutions to choreographic problems that reveal the interrelationship
between purpose, context and meaning

analysis and interpretation of elements of dance and structure to examine a choreographic
problem/s

evaluation of dance by justifying choices made in terms of elements of dance and structure
used to communicate meaning
identification of a choreographic problem/s
description of own work and solutions uses examples of elements of dance or structure
description of ideas about choreographic problem/s
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

organisation and application makes purpose and context explicit through integration of
elements of dance, structure and use of production elements

creation of dance reveals complex and subtle layers of meaning to communicate viewpoint
with impact and sensitivity

organisation and application enhance purpose and context through dynamics, and
relationships

creation of dance is enhanced through cohesion of interconnected elements of dance,
choreographic devices and production elements

organisation and application reveals choices in production elements, elements of dance
and choreographic devices, including motif/s and form, to support stated purpose and
context

creation of dance manipulates the elements of dance, choreographic devices and
production elements to communicate the viewpoint

organisation and application of elements of dance, choreographic devices and production
elements for a stated purpose and context
creation of dance to communicate a personal viewpoint

organisation of movement to develop transitions using elements of dance, choreographic
devices or production elements

movement sequences use elements of dance, choreographic devices or production
elements that link to personal viewpoint
development of short sequences of movement
use of elements of dance, choreographic devices or production elements to shape ideas
development of isolated movements to show ideas
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Realising meaning through technical and expressive skills

descriptors:
application shows sustained control and synthesis of complex movements to present a
cohesive performance

realisation shows subtleties of meaning through a synthesis of expressive skills, including
relationships between dancers, audience, space and/or objects
application of technical skills shows accuracy and extension of movements through space

realisation of meaning through sustained use of focus, projection, facial and body
expression, variations in movement qualities and musicality (rhythm, accents, phrasing) to
communicate the stated meaning
application of technical skills in a personal movement style
realisation of meaning through expressive skills that communicate the stated viewpoint
application of timing and spatial awareness is evident in isolated movement phrases
use of focus, projection, facial and/or body expression in isolated phrases of movement
coordination of simple movements
demonstration of variations in energy
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

criteria.criterion:
Understanding and evaluating dance concepts: Choreographic
statement

Analysing and evaluating dance concepts: Evaluative
response
Realising meaning through technical and expressive skills
